title: TVS Supply Chain Solutions is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: TVS Supply Chain Solutions is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!
